channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 108 Sandyhill Road SE18, 16th June
item.description:
Blocked street gully outside the property

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sandy Hill Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 11 Sandyhill Road SE18, 16th June
item.description:
It’s been months of this mess. Sandyhill hill Road care is a disaster!!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sandy Hill Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead trees, 16th June
item.description:
Trees that were planted a few years ago didn’t survive and one was destroyed by kids “playing”. There was NO after care from the contractor who ever that’s might have been

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Margarets Grove, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 237 Burrage Road SE18, 16th June
item.description:
Bins constantly left on the pavement blocking the path for buggies, kids going to school on scooters , elderly people with sticks etc. Also the ivy is taking over the pavement needs to be trimmed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burrage Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is obstructing the path, 16th June
item.description:
The tree is hanging very low requiring most people to duck in order to walk under it. It is difficult for disabled people to pass by and dangerous to blind or partially sighted people. The problem is even worse during and after heavy rain when the water causes it to droop lower.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croydon Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Streetlight is out., 16th June
item.description:
This light has been out for about 2 weeks. It is the second lamp in on Cornwall Road just off of Lancaster Road. As a woman working late it's an anxiety inducing stretch of Road as it is SO dark.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Cornwall Road, Stroud Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Possible hazardous nitrous oxide canisters, 16th June
item.description:
This item has been reported and was marked as 'resolved in May. Ref: 9517681 However, please note that the items are still at the location. These items need to be taken away.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sydney Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned possibly stolen scooter, 16th June
item.description:
Scooter type used for food delivery left at side of road with some panels removed see photos. Reg LB23 NHB

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camelot Close, Plumstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Well Street building lights not on at 10pm, 16th June
item.description:
External building lights at Well Street on Frampton Park estate out at 10 pm. This is an ongoing issue that never seems to be fixed. All other buildings on the estate are lit up.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Well Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large differences between two slabs, 16th June
item.description:
This defect caused me to badly crumble my ankle resulting in a trip to A&E and a boot for 6 weeks. I have been referred for physio and it has impacted my job and life. I do not know how long the issue has been there. My accident took place at approximately 3pm on 30th May.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 86, Crofton Lane, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 16th June
item.description:
For the third night in a row a white transit tipper van has reversed into the garages and dumped untold amount of rubbish before accelerating hard away with his lights off, spreading rubbish across the street.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westmount Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garbage on the ground, 16th June
item.description:
Lots of garbage next to pedestrian way

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tunnel Avenue, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post on roof of Bamboo restaurant, 16th June
item.description:
This post looks very unstable & if it should fall, it could endanger life.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dukes Orchard, Coldblow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bikes everywhere on the floor, blocking cycle route and pavements., 16th June
item.description:
Voi bikes regularly left here for days and weeks without use. Voi need to make sure that if their bikes are not moved from a location then they need to move them themselves. Sometimes up to twenty or thirty bikes here at any on time

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Finsbury Park Road, Stoke Newington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very poor lighting, 16th June
item.description:
This is a public footpath with at least three lamp posts not working between the two Park gates and at least two other lamp posts where the trees are so overgrown the lights have almost no effect. Does not feel safe and could lead to potential injury.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Magpie Hall Lane, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Smell, 16th June
item.description:
The area close to Buxton Road in Friern Barney Lane has a smell of sewer at least once a day usually between the hours of 9–12 but sometimes the smell is ahoiks 10 o’clock in the night the-smell of sewage is strong and lingering for an hour or so in area
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37A, Friern Barnet Lane, Friern Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping vicars close, 16th June
item.description:
Someone has dumped a rug and some piece of wood since Monday that's when I saw it first

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Northiam Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped waste, 16th June
item.description:
Could you please remove the dumped waste and install warning signs? Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fieldfare Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass, 16th June
item.description:
Broken glass outside route to Stockwell primary school and Lansdowne special educational needs and disabilities school

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 49, Combermere Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Caught fly tipping, 16th June
item.description:
People in 101 Oakley drive have been dumping rubbish round the corner where the garages are as seen in photos. There is always rubbish on this corner but this time as seen in photos have been caught on camera fly tipping a huge bed frame on the corner. These are new residents and would like something done about this towards them as it makes the area look disgusting with rubbish dumped and it’s illegal.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 109, Oakley Drive, New Eltham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
